lens: would the code do the right thing for every normal input, even though it runs without crashing — judge whether the logic produces the correct result
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness, driver, scorer, and golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/logic-error/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (LE-001, LE-002, ...).
